calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lavon Gramger. Petitioner Ye Fei Chen was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's Name to Phil Chen. Decree signed in open court.
